context_notes: On branch feature/chart-form-rebuild (23 commits ahead of main). PR #2 open. The chart form rebuild (add form + edit modal) is complete and high-fidelity to DesignOS. But the chart DETAIL page and chart GALLERY/LIST page were built quick-and-functional in Plan 02-04 and never aligned to the DesignOS designs. Four components are completely missing (ChartGallery, ChartCard, ChartListRow, FilterBar) and ChartDetail needs significant enrichment. A new plan 02-06 must be created and executed before Phase 2 can close.
